aiAntiNoShow.title: IA Anti-NoShow

smartTriage.title: Smart Triage
smartTriage.description: Dynamic patient intake that adapts to symptoms. Route cases to the right specialist instantly with automated urgency tagging.

privacy.title: The Handshake Protocol
privacy.description: On-demand support access with zero privacy friction. Secure, time-limited, and audited sessions that protect patient data while you get help.
